$_comment: BAD EXAMPLE: Single-word queries, no doc_id scoping, compound queries, and missing slides.

queries.query: margins AND costs AND infrastructure AND savings AND APAC

$_failures: query='revenue' is a single word — too broad, retriever returns noise from every mention of revenue
query contains AND-chaining of 5 concepts — compound queries dilute retrieval relevance
doc_ids=[] on all queries means the retriever searches the entire corpus with no scoping
Only 2 slides have retrieval plans but the outline has 5+ content slides — missing coverage
Slide s3 has only 1 query — should have 2-4 for a KPI slide that needs multiple metrics
No queries for the risk slide (s6) or hiring plan slide (s7) which are data-heavy
